questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A number arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: $\quad 41, \quad 19, \quad 218, \quad229, \quad 317, \quad 64, \quad 107$
Step I: $\quad 317, \quad 19, \quad 218, \quad 229, \quad 41, \quad 64, \quad 107$
Step II: $\quad 317, \quad 229, \quad 19, \quad 218,\quad 41, \quad 64, \quad 107$
These steps get repeated thereafter.

The third step of a given input is 574, 479, 153, 79, 354, 432, 106, 84. What will be step VII for the input?
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is the numbers are getting arranged in descending order.
Step I: The largest of the given numbers interchanges its place with the first number. [In case the largest number is already arranged, the second largest is interchanged with the number next to the largest and so on.]
Step II: The same process as that of step I will happen here but in this step, nos. will be shifted rightwards instead of interchange.

Step III: $574, 479, 153, 79, 354, 432, 106, 84$ (Given)
Step IV: $574, 479, 432, 153, 79, 354, 106, 84$ (The rest shifted)
Step V: $574, 479, 432, 354, 79, 153, 106, 84$ (interchanged)
Step VI: $574, 479, 432, 354, 153, 79, 106, 84$ (Shifted)
Step VII: $574, 479, 432, 354, 153, 106, 79, 84$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:

Step II: $\quad 317, \quad 229, \quad 19, \quad 218,\quad 41, \quad 64, \quad 107$
These steps get repeated thereafter.

What will be the sixth step of the following input?
Input: 320, 211, 59, 68, 119, 158, 63
options: Cannot be determined
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is the numbers are getting arranged in descending order.
Step I: The largest of the given numbers interchanges its place with the first number. [In case the largest number is already arranged, the second largest is interchanged with the number next to the largest and so on.]
Step II: The same process as that of step I will happen here but in this step, nos. will be shifted rightwards instead of interchange.

Input: $320, 211, 59, 68, 119, 158, 63$
Step I: $320, 211, 158, 68, 119, 59, 63$
Step II: $320, 211, 158, 119, 68, 59, 63$
Step III: $320, 211, 158, 119, 68, 63, 59$
Since all the nos. are fully arranged in descending order only in three steps hence the machine will not operate on these numbers.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

VI

VIII

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions (Q. 6-12): Study the following information to answer the given questions.
A number arrangement machine when given an input of numbers, rearranges them following a particular rule in each step. The following is an illustration of input and steps of rearrangement.
Input: $\quad 46 \quad 185 \quad 310 \quad 436 \quad96 \quad 217 \quad 39 \quad$
Step I: $\quad4 36 \quad 46 \quad 185 \quad 310 \quad 96 \quad 217 \quad 39 \quad$
Step II: $\quad 436 \quad 39 \quad 46 \quad 185 \quad310 \quad 96 \quad 217 \quad$
Step III: $\quad 436 \quad 39 \quad 310 \quad 46 \quad185 \quad 96 \quad 217 \quad$
Step IV:  $\quad 436 \quad 39 \quad 310 \quad 46 \quad 217 \quad 185 \quad 96 \quad$
Step V: $\quad 436 \quad 39 \quad 310 \quad  46 \quad 217 \quad 96 \quad 185 \quad$
This is the final arrangement and Step V is the last
step for this input.

Which of the following is the last step for the following input?
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is: The numbers are getting arranged in alternate series; one in descending order and the other in ascending order.
Step I: The largest of the given numbers comes to the place of first number and the rest shift rightward.
Step II: The smallest of the given numbers comes to the place of second number and the rest shift rightward.
Step III: The second largest of the given numbers comes to the place of third number and the rest shift rightward.
Step IV: The second smallest of the given numbers comes to the place of fourth number and the rest shift rightward and so on until the alternate series is formed.

Input: $47,432,127,52,309,87,28,116$
In such case the final step can be written directly.
$432,28,309,47,127,52,116,87$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

If 631, 29, 520, 474, 48, 312, 502, 36, 68 is the third step of an input, which of the following steps will be 631, 29, 520, 36, 502, 48, 474, 312, 68?
options: Sixth
Fifth
Seventh
Cannot be determined
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is: The numbers are getting arranged in alternate series; one in descending order and the other in ascending order.
Step I: The largest of the given numbers comes to the place of first number and the rest shift rightward.
Step II: The smallest of the given numbers comes to the place of second number and the rest shift rightward.
Step III: The second largest of the given numbers comes to the place of third number and the rest shift rightward.
Step IV: The second smallest of the given numbers comes to the place of fourth number and the rest shift rightward and so on until the alternate series is formed.

Step III: $631, 29, 520, 474, 48, 312, 502, 36, 68$
Step IV: $631, 29, 520, 36, 474, 48, 312, 502, 68$
Step V: $631, 29, 520, 36, 502, 474, 48, 312, 68$
Step VI: $631, 29, 520, 36, 502, 48, 474, 312, 68$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Pull the cover and then push into
Step I: Pull the then and cover push into
Step II: then the pull into push cover and
Step III: into pull the then and cover push
Step IV: into pull and then the cover push
and so on.
As per the rule followed in the above steps, find out
the appropriate step for the given input or vice versa in the following questions.

Input: Try your best until you get goal Which of the following steps would be ‘get goal try until you your best’?
options: Step 2
Step 3
Step 4
Can't be determined
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is:
Input to step I: The third and fifth words get interchanged among themselves.
Step I to Step II: The group of first three words gets reversed and so does the group of last four.
Step II to Step III: The group of first four words gets reversed and so does the group of last three.
Step III to Step IV: Same as input to step I.
For convenience, if we assign nos. to each word of the input as pull-1, the-2, cover-3, and-4, then-5, push-6 and into-7, then we get,
$\begin{array}{llllllll} 
\text { Input: } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 \\
\text { Step I: } & 1 & 2 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 6 & 7 \\
\text { Step II: } & 5 & 2 & 1 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 4 \\
\text { Step III: } & 7 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 6 \\
\text { Step IV: } & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2 & 3 & 6 \\
\text { Step V: } & 4 & 1 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 2 & 5 \\
\text { Step VI: } & 6 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2 & 3 \\
\text { Step VII: } & 6 & 7 & 5 & 4 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\
\text { Step VIII: } & 5 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 2 & 1 & 4
\end{array}$

Input: Try your best until you get goal
$\begin{array}{lllllll}
1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7
\end{array}$
Arrangement: get goal try until you your best Step VI: $\quad \begin{array}{lllllll} & 6 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2\end{array}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Pull the cover and then push into
Step I: Pull the then and cover push into
Step II: then the pull into push cover and
Step III: into pull the then and cover push
Step IV: into pull and then the cover push
and so on.
As per the rule followed in the above steps, find out
the appropriate step for the given input or vice versa in the following questions.

If Step VI of an input is ‘deep gutter ball into the has fallen’, which of the following would definitely be the input?
options: has the ball fallen into deep gutter
ball has fallen into the deep gutter
deep gutter has fallen into the ball
gutter has deep ball fallen into the
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is:
Input to step I: The third and fifth words get interchanged among themselves.
Step I to Step II: The group of first three words gets reversed and so does the group of last four.
Step II to Step III: The group of first four words gets reversed and so does the group of last three.
Step III to Step IV: Same as input to step I.
For convenience, if we assign nos. to each word of the input as pull-1, the-2, cover-3, and-4, then-5, push-6 and into-7, then we get,
$\begin{array}{llllllll} 
\text { Input: } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 \\
\text { Step I: } & 1 & 2 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 6 & 7 \\
\text { Step II: } & 5 & 2 & 1 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 4 \\
\text { Step III: } & 7 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 6 \\
\text { Step IV: } & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2 & 3 & 6 \\
\text { Step V: } & 4 & 1 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 2 & 5 \\
\text { Step VI: } & 6 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2 & 3 \\
\text { Step VII: } & 6 & 7 & 5 & 4 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\
\text { Step VIII: } & 5 & 7 & 6 & 3 & 2 & 1 & 4
\end{array}$

Step VI: $\begin{array}{lllllll}6 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 5 & 2 & 3\end{array}$ deep gutter ball into the has fallen Input: Ball has fallen into the deep gutter $\begin{array}{lllllll}1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7\end{array}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the following information to answer the given questions.
A word arrangement machine when given an input line of words, rearranges them following a particular rule in each step. The following is an illustration of the input and the steps of rearrangement.
Input: go for the cinema on Tuesday
Step I: Tuesday go for the cinema on
Step II: Tuesday cinema go for the on
Step III: Tuesday cinema the go for on
Step IV: Tuesday cinema the for go on
Step V: Tuesday cinema the for on go
(Step V is the last step for this input.)
As per the rules followed in the above steps, find out the appropriate answers to the questions given below.

What would be the last step for the following input?
Input: religion provide moral and ethical values
options: religion ethical provide values moral and
religion provide ethical moral values and
religion provide ethical values moral and
and moral values religion provide ethical
questions.solution: The last step is the arrangement finally desired.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Step II: Tuesday cinema go for the on
Step III: Tuesday cinema the go for on
Step IV: Tuesday cinema the for go on
Step V: Tuesday cinema the for on go
(Step V is the last step for this input.)
As per the rules followed in the above steps, find out the appropriate answers to the questions given below.

What would be the penultimate step for the following input?
Input: the of president new Indonesia is Waheed
options: president Indonesia Waheed the new of is
president Indonesia Waheed the of new is
president Waheed Indonesia the new of is
president Waheed Indonesia new the of is
questions.solution:
The words get arranged one by one on the basis of the no. of letters, the largest word getting arranged first. If the no. of letters is the same, the word that comes later in the dictionary gets arranged first. While one word gets arranged, the others shift rightwards.

Input: the of president new Indonesia is Waheed Step I: president the of new Indonesia is Waheed Step II: president Indonesia the of new is Waheed Step III: president Indonesia Waheed the of new is Step IV: president Indonesia Waheed the new of is Thus, Step III.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Is 9 and 2 equal to 11.
Step I: Is 2 and 9 equal to 11.
Step II: Is 2 to 9 equal and 11.
Step III: Is 2 to 9 and equal 11.
Step IV: Is 2 to 9 and 11 equal.
This is the last step of this input. Study the logic and answer the questions that follow:

Input: 3 kilo of each means 1.4 and 1.6
For the above input, which step will be the following arrangement?
Arrangement: of 1.4 and 1.6 means kilo 3 each
options: Step III
Step IV
Step V
Step II
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is:
A keen watch of last step will help in determining the logic. Words and numbers get arranged alternately. Word with less no. of letters precedes words with more letters and in case of words with equal no. of letters, arrangement occurs according to that in dictionary. Numbers are getting arranged in ascending order. The arrangement takes place in each step by interchanging.

Input: 3 kilo of each means 1.4 and 1.6
Step I: of kilo 3 each means 1.4 and 1.6
Step II: of 1.43 each means kilo and 1.6
Step III: of 1.4 and each means kilo 3.6
Step IV: of 1.4 and 1.6 means kilo 3 each
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

For the input given below, five steps have been given, though not respectively. However, one of these is not the correct arrangement for any of the first five steps. The number of that option is your answer.
Input: Dial 24  10  57  4 to contact us
options: to 4 10 57 24 Dial contact us.
to 4 us 57 24 Dial contact 10.
to 24  10 57 4 Dial contact us.
to 4 us 24 Dial 57 10 contact.
questions.solution:
Here the rule followed is:
A keen watch of last step will help in determining the logic. Words and numbers get arranged alternately. Word with less no. of letters precedes words with more letters and in case of words with equal no. of letters, arrangement occurs according to that in dictionary. Numbers are getting arranged in ascending order. The arrangement takes place in each step by interchanging.

Input: Dial 2410574 to contact us.

Step II: to 4105724 Dial contact us. [Option 1]
Step III: to 4 us 5724 Dial contact 10. [Option 2]

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Ja Ma Da Ch Ha Bo Ka
Step I: Da Ja Ma Ha Bo Ka Ch
Step II: Ha Da Ja Ma Ka Ch Bo
Step III: Ja Ha  Da Ka Ch Bo Ma
and so on.
As per the rule followed in the above steps, find out the appropriate answers in the following questions.

 If Step II of an input is ‘ga re bu la ra hi hai’, what would be step VII?
options: ra ga hai hi re la bu
hai ga ra bu hi re la
hi ra hai  ga la bu re
ra hai ga hi re la bu
questions.solution:
For the sake of convenience, assign numbers to each word of the input.
Input: $\begin{array}{lllllll}Ja & Ma & Da & Ch & Ha & Bo & Ka\end{array}$
$\begin{array}{lllllll}
&&&1 && 2 && 3 && 4 & 5 && 6 && 7
\end{array}$
Now, in Step I, the third word comes at the beginning and the first and second words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fourth word goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
In Step II, the fourth word from the previous step comes at the beginning while the first three words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fifth word of Step I goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
These steps are repeated thereafter For convenience, we plot the movement of each word in each step by the numbers assigned to them in the input.
$\begin{array}{lcccccccc} 
\text { Input: } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 & \\
\text { Step I: } & 3 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 6 & 7 & 4 & \\
\text { Step II: } & 5 & 3 & 1 & 2 & 7 & 4 & 6 & \\
\text { Step III: } & 1 & 5 & 3 & 7 & 4 & 6 & 2 \\
\text { Step IV: } & 7 & 1 & 5 & 3 & 6 & 2 & 4 \\
\text { Step V: } & 5 & 7 & 1 & 6 & 2 & 4 & 3 \\
\text { Step VI: } & 6 & 5 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 3 & 2 & \\
\text { Step VII: } & 7 & 6 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 2 & 1 \\
\text { Step VIII: } & 4 & 7 & 6 & 5 & 2 & 1 & 3 &
\end{array}$

From the table the numbers in step II are
$\begin{array}{lllllll}5 & 3 & 1 & 2 & 7 & 4 & 6\end{array}$
ga re bu la ra hi hai
In Step VII, we have the numbers arranged as
$\begin{array}{ccccccc}7 & 6 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 2 & 1 \\ \text { ra } & \text { hai } & \text { ga } & \text { hi } &  \text { re } & \text { la } & \text{ bu }\end{array}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Ja Ma Da Ch Ha Bo Ka
Step I: Da Ja Ma Ha Bo Ka Ch
Step II: Ha Da Ja Ma Ka Ch Bo
Step III: Ja Ha  Da Ka Ch Bo Ma
and so on.
As per the rule followed in the above steps, find out the appropriate answers in the following questions.

 Input: hai da di Mo su ka au
Which of the following will be the 4th step for this in put?
options: hai su di au Mo ka da
au hai su di ka da Mo
su au hai ka da Mo di
au su hai di ka do Mo
questions.solution:
For the sake of convenience, assign numbers to each word of the input.
Input: $\begin{array}{lllllll}Ja & Ma & Da & Ch & Ha & Bo & Ka\end{array}$
$\begin{array}{lllllll}
&&&1 && 2 && 3 && 4 & 5 && 6 && 7
\end{array}$
Now, in Step I, the third word comes at the beginning and the first and second words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fourth word goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
In Step II, the fourth word from the previous step comes at the beginning while the first three words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fifth word of Step I goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
These steps are repeated thereafter For convenience, we plot the movement of each word in each step by the numbers assigned to them in the input.
$\begin{array}{lcccccccc} 
\text { Input: } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 & \\
\text { Step I: } & 3 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 6 & 7 & 4 & \\
\text { Step II: } & 5 & 3 & 1 & 2 & 7 & 4 & 6 & \\
\text { Step III: } & 1 & 5 & 3 & 7 & 4 & 6 & 2 \\
\text { Step IV: } & 7 & 1 & 5 & 3 & 6 & 2 & 4 \\
\text { Step V: } & 5 & 7 & 1 & 6 & 2 & 4 & 3 \\
\text { Step VI: } & 6 & 5 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 3 & 2 & \\
\text { Step VII: } & 7 & 6 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 2 & 1 \\
\text { Step VIII: } & 4 & 7 & 6 & 5 & 2 & 1 & 3 &
\end{array}$

Input: $\begin{array}{llllll}hai & da & di &  Mo & su & ka & au\end{array}$ 
$\begin{array}{llllll}&&&1 && 2 && 3 & 4 && 5 & 6 &&7\end{array}$

Step IV: $\begin{array}{llllll}7 && 1 && 5 & 3 & 6 && 2 &&4\end{array}$ 
$\begin{array}{llllll}&&&au & hai & su & di & ka & da & Mo\end{array}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
A word arrangement machine, when given a particular input, rearranges it following a particular rule. The following is the illustration of the input and the steps of arrangement:
Input: Ja Ma Da Ch Ha Bo Ka
Step I: Da Ja Ma Ha Bo Ka Ch
Step II: Ha Da Ja Ma Ka Ch Bo
Step III: Ja Ha  Da Ka Ch Bo Ma
and so on.
As per the rule followed in the above steps, find out the appropriate answers in the following questions.

If Step IV of an input is ‘Na Che Ne aye angan to rha’, what would be the VIIIth step?
options: Na angan Ne rha aye to Che
angan Narha Ne to Che aye
rha Na angan Ne to Che aye
Na rha angan Ne to Che aye
questions.solution:
For the sake of convenience, assign numbers to each word of the input.
Input: $\begin{array}{lllllll}Ja & Ma & Da & Ch & Ha & Bo & Ka\end{array}$
$\begin{array}{lllllll}
&&&1 && 2 && 3 && 4 & 5 && 6 && 7
\end{array}$
Now, in Step I, the third word comes at the beginning and the first and second words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fourth word goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
In Step II, the fourth word from the previous step comes at the beginning while the first three words are pushed rightwards. Also, the fifth word of Step I goes at the end and the remaining words are pushed leftwards.
These steps are repeated thereafter For convenience, we plot the movement of each word in each step by the numbers assigned to them in the input.
$\begin{array}{lcccccccc} 
\text { Input: } & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 & \\
\text { Step I: } & 3 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 6 & 7 & 4 & \\
\text { Step II: } & 5 & 3 & 1 & 2 & 7 & 4 & 6 & \\
\text { Step III: } & 1 & 5 & 3 & 7 & 4 & 6 & 2 \\
\text { Step IV: } & 7 & 1 & 5 & 3 & 6 & 2 & 4 \\
\text { Step V: } & 5 & 7 & 1 & 6 & 2 & 4 & 3 \\
\text { Step VI: } & 6 & 5 & 7 & 1 & 4 & 3 & 2 & \\
\text { Step VII: } & 7 & 6 & 5 & 4 & 3 & 2 & 1 \\
\text { Step VIII: } & 4 & 7 & 6 & 5 & 2 & 1 & 3 &
\end{array}$

Step IV: $\begin{array}{lllllll}Na & Che & Ne & aye & angan & to & rha\end{array}$
$\begin{array}{lllllll}&&&7 &&& 1 && 5 && 3 && 6 && 2 && 4\end{array}$
Step VIII: $\begin{array}{lllllll}4 && 7 && 6 &&& 5 && 2 && 1 && 3\end{array}$ 
$\begin{array}{lllllll}&&&&rha & Na & angan & Ne & to & Che & aye\end{array}$
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

\text { Step I: } & 3 & 1 & 2 & 5 & 6 & 7 & 4 & \\

Li Bhi or Bo ki sso ya
or Li Bhi Bo ya ki sso
